no: Improved Luck install this or ZStweaks (5% critical hit chances, 2 AC, 5% more to thieving, 1 turn), but not both goes after SubtleD's spell tweaks

spells: Luck spell rebalanced with improved mechanics

sum: Doubles the Luck spell's effects to provide +10% thief skills and +2 to luck and saving throws, while extending duration to 1 turn.
